description: Originally launched on BSC, 币安人生 (pronounced: Bi An Rensheng) is a Chinese memecoin for Changpeng Zhao’s latest book. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 币安人生 (1:1 pegged to BEP-20 币安人生) gives original 币安人生 holders, traders, and users instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, transforming 币安人生 into a faster, smarter, and more scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: 币安人生
